steps.title: Identify the tangent sides
steps.content: For angle $A$, the opposite side is $20$ and the adjacent side is $21$. Those are the two side lengths needed for tangent, while the hypotenuse is not used.

steps.title: Apply the tangent ratio
steps.content: Use opposite over adjacent: $$\tan A=\frac{20}{21}$$ The answer is C.
